company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides AI-powered automated video editing tools, designed to help content creators save time and produce professional-quality videos effortlessly.

company_policies.details: No refunds after 7 days of purchase. Refunds are only available within the first 7 days of a new subscription.
24/7 support is available exclusively on the Pro plan. Basic plan users have access to email support during business hours.
Users can cancel their subscription at any time. The subscription remains active until the end of the current billing period.
All uploaded videos are stored securely and are not shared with third parties. Users retain full ownership of their content.

faqs.question: What video formats does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, and MKV formats for upload. Exports are available in MP4 and MOV.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade at any time. You will be charged the pro-rated difference for the remaining billing cycle.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: We offer a 7-day free trial for the Pro plan. No credit card required to start.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream work with?
faqs.answer: AutoStream works seamlessly with YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, Facebook, and LinkedIn.
